resources.string: Karter runs on your device. This summary explains what the app accesses and why.
Used for weather on the dashboard and GPS speed. Coordinates are sent only to Open-Meteo for weather forecasts. We do not operate a backend that stores your location.

The built-in phone hub can open your device\'s default phone and contacts apps, and place outgoing calls through a paired phone over Bluetooth hands-free. No contacts or call history is read directly by Karter.
Optional. Used only to read active media session metadata (track title, artist, album art) for the Now playing widget. No message or notification text is collected.
Shows connected device names on the dashboard. No audio or message content is read.
Weather requests go to api.open-meteo.com. The app may ping a small endpoint to verify internet connectivity before refreshing weather.
Theme, dock shortcuts, hidden apps, and setup progress are stored locally with Android DataStore. Android backup may include preferences if enabled on your device.
